name: par3
description: Streaming PAR3-style erasure coding for Cloudflare Workers and local Node.js repair workflows

scripts.test:js: npm run build:wasm && node --experimental-wasm-modules --test _worker_test.js bin/main_test.js lib/mod_test.js lib/multipart_test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:js
scripts.test:watch: npm run build:wasm && node --experimental-wasm-modules --test --watch _worker_test.js bin/main_test.js lib/mod_test.js lib/multipart_test.js
